revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Commons category link from Wikidata]] to [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing the category recursion error
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
fixing the category recursion error in [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
Adding [[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:New pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024 fixed]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Text replacement - "Category::" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Removing from [[Category:11]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing redirects]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Bot: create page
Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1239_deaths here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1239_deaths for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q6705936}} <!--interwikis--> <!--categories--> [[Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]]
